positive: A mystical, highly stylized forest biome featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central focus is a majestic, geometric stag silhouette reaching its antlers towards a glowing crescent moon. Interspersed around the stag are intricate, abstract vein-like patterns of glowing mushrooms, stylized river rapids, and floating geometric leaf motifs. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau meets Vaporwave, rendered with thick, impactful line work (tattoo style quality) and flat color blocking. Strong emphasis on symmetrical composition and high contrast between deep indigo, glowing cyan, and luminous teal against a midnight black background. Clean lines, visible negative space, suitable for repeating seamless print. UHD, vector art aesthetic, central composition, high contrast.
negative: blurry, grainy, photorealistic, 3D render, watermark, signature, text, logo, extra limbs, deformed, mutated, ugly, poor anatomy, low resolution, noise
